terms.title: IREP (Incremental Reduced Error Pruning)
terms.summary: IREP (Incremental Reduced Error Pruning) belongs to the Model Optimization area of AI/ML, within Model Compression. It sits inside Model Optimization / Model Compression. Start after Reduced Error Pruning and Model Pruning.

related: RIPPER (Repeated Incremental Pruning to Produce Error Reduction)
